ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the investment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the investment */,
  "cagr" REAL /* Compound Annual Growth Rate */,
  "stdev" REAL /* Standard Deviation of the investment's returns */,
  "best_year" REAL /* Best year performance percentage */,
  "worst_year" REAL /* Worst year performance percentage */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown percentage */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe Ratio of the investment */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino Ratio of the investment */,
  "market_correlation" REAL /* Market correlation coefficient */,
  "trailing_returns_1y" REAL /* Trailing returns over the past 1 year */,
  "trailing_returns_3y" REAL /* Trailing returns over the past 3 years */,
  "trailing_returns_5y" REAL /* Trailing returns over the past 5 years */,
  "fees_expense_ratio" REAL /* Expense ratio of the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "total_investments" INTEGER /* Total number of investments in the portfolio */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total market value of the portfolio */,
  "investment_objective" TEXT /* Primary investment objective (e.g., growth, income) */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance level of the portfolio (e.g., conservative, aggressive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_investments" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "allocation_percentage" REAL /* Percentage allocation of the investment in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the investment was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the investment was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the manager */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the manager (e.g., lead manager, assistant) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the client */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio associated with the client */,
  "net_worth" REAL /* Client's net worth */,
  "investment_goals" TEXT /* Description of the client's investment goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "performance_summary" TEXT /* Summary of portfolio performance */,
  "risk_analysis" TEXT /* Analysis of risk associated with the portfolio */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for future investment decisions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_metrics" (
  "risk_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk metric record */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment associated with this risk metric */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta coefficient of the investment */,
  "value_at_risk" REAL /* Value at Risk at a given confidence level */,
  "expected_shortfall" REAL /* Expected shortfall for the investment */,
  "conditional_value_at_risk" REAL /* Conditional Value at Risk for the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_metrics_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the market condition (e.g., Bull Market, Bear Market) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market condition */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the condition on investments */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Date range for which the market condition is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment associated with this trend */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "supporting_factors" TEXT /* Factors contributing to the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_trends_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for user communication */,
  "role" TEXT /* User's role (e.g., manager, analyst, client) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment associated with this dividend */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was paid */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend payment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dividend payments (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_records" (
  "tax_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax record */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment associated with this tax record */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the tax record is applicable */,
  "tax_basis" REAL /* Tax basis of the investment */,
  "capital_gains" REAL /* Capital gains realized from the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_records_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)
